summary: A stepped pyramid-like monument structure with a rectangular footprint, featuring a tiered wooden roof, stone brick walls with decorative gold/yellow accents, and a concrete foundation platform. The building sits on a raised dirt mound surrounded by a white concrete border.
rebuild_hints: Build a rectangular concrete foundation platform approximately 10x8 blocks
Create a white concrete border frame around the perimeter
Construct the main stone brick wall body with 2 visible tiers
Add gold/yellow decorative blocks as horizontal accent stripes on the stone wall
Layer wooden planks for the stepped roof, creating 3-4 ascending tiers
Ensure bilateral symmetry along both the width and depth axes
Place the structure on a raised dirt mound with sloped edges
The roof peaks at the center with stepped descents on all sides
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Precise block count for each tier difficult to determine from angles
Whether the structure is hollow or solid internally
Exact shade/type of gold accent material (could be gold blocks, ore, or other variants)
Whether there are windows or openings on sides not visible in provided images
